story.text:
# 💡 AGENTS.md ⊥ SOUL.md
**concept** · shared · knowledge

The companion spec pair held apart: AGENTS.md (the AAIF agent-instruction file standard — what the agent is told) ⊥ SOUL.md (the bearer-private soul file — what the companion is). The Familiars' taming canon: instruction is public substrate, soul is bearer-kept; the ⊥ is the Φ-gap applied to companions.
